quote_text: We respect the courage it takes to report wrongdoing, and we will stand with families in this process.
The investigation revealed corruption at multiple levels, and the public deserves transparency.
Our focus is on accountability, not retaliation, and on fixing what is broken.
This has been hard on the family, and we hope for space and time to heal.
Whistleblowing is a safeguard that helps institutions correct course and rebuild trust.
It's a cover-up exposed at last, and those bribe-takers should be named and shamed.
We ask for calm, respect for due process, and compassion for everyone involved.
